title: Creamy Mediterranean Casserole
description: A rich and savory casserole filled with the flavors of the Mediterranean, perfect for a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: milk
ingredients.notes: dairy milk or non-dairy milk alternative

instructions: Cook the casserole according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, combine the garlic and garlicky spread over medium heat.
Stir in the milk, feta cheese, olives, and parsley.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until heated through.
In a large serving dish, combine the cooked casserole and the garlic mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is melted.
